report.summary: Day 15 evening community cycle: drafted quantum-resistant crypto thread (7 posts), perpetual DEX tweet, Hyperliquid pmUSDH timely tweet, Sunday market snapshot, newsletter supplement for 2 new guides; created 2 SVG social cards (quantum crypto + perp DEX) — all based on today's 2 new learn guide builds and live market data.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (7 posts): Quantum-Resistant Crypto — hook on FBI 'Year of Quantum Security 2026,' 25% BTC vulnerability stat, NIST 4 standards breakdown, $9.37B sector cap + QRL +20%, top 5 projects, Ethereum 2026 roadmap inclusion, CTA to /learn/quantum-resistant-crypto-guide
Tweet: Best Perpetual DEXs — $10B daily volume, Hyperliquid 70%+ market share ($8B/day), HIP-4 prediction markets + synthetic RWAs, links to /learn/best-perpetual-dex-guide
Tweet (timely): Hyperliquid pmUSDH launches March 15 — interest-bearing stablecoin collateral by Native Markets, ties to perp DEX guide
Tweet: Sunday market snapshot — BTC $71,051 (+0.55%), ETH $2,088, week's narratives (quantum security, Solana×Mastercard, perp DEXs $10B, AI agents), brand awareness CTA
Newsletter supplement: 2 new guide entries for Thursday send (quantum-resistant crypto + best perpetual DEXs) with market context and key stats
Discord/Telegram announcement: 2 new guides built with slugs and key highlights

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-quantum-resistant-crypto.svg — 1200×630 social card: quantum circuit decoration, shield/lock icon, gradient title, 4 stat cards ($9.37B market cap, 25% BTC at risk, 4 NIST standards, QRL +20.4%), NIST standard tags (ML-KEM, ML-DSA, SLH-DSA, FN-DSA) + project tags (QRL, QANX). Saved to /public/

social-perpetual-dex-guide.svg — 1200×630 social card: candlestick chart decoration, $10B daily volume hero stat, horizontal market share bars (Hyperliquid 70%, dYdX 14%, GMX 5%, Others 11%), comparison category pills (Fees, Leverage, Liquidity, Speed, Decentralization, Risk), HIP-4 prediction markets badge. Saved to /public/

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 15 — no Google Search Console organic data yet; first impressions expected within days (typical new-site indexing lag: 14-21 days)
269 pages live (3 published today: Alpenglow, OnFi, Stablecoins) + 2 new guides built today (quantum crypto, perp DEXs) in PUBLISH_QUEUE
Market context: BTC $71,051, ETH $2,088 — cautiously positive sentiment; dominant narratives this week are quantum security, AI agents, and institutional infra
Quantum-resistant crypto is the top emerging narrative: FBI/CISA/NIST declared 'Year of Quantum Security 2026,' QRL +20%, $9.37B sector, Ethereum roadmap inclusion
Perpetual DEX sector: $10B daily volume, 75% growth in 2 years, Hyperliquid at 70%+ dominance with $8B/day, pmUSDH launching today (March 15)
Recommended posting: quantum thread at 3PM UTC (Sunday prime), perp DEX at 5PM, pmUSDH at 6PM, market snapshot at 8PM
All drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-15-social-drafts-v2.md

sections.title: Growth Opportunities Identified
items: Quantum-resistant crypto has extremely high search demand with relatively low competition — our comprehensive guide (549 lines, 14 min read) is well-positioned to capture early organic traffic
Perpetual DEX comparison is a high-intent keyword cluster — users searching for 'best perp DEX' are active traders with high engagement potential
Hyperliquid pmUSDH launch today provides a timely hook — same-day coverage signals authority and freshness to both users and Google
Solana×Mastercard partnership news pairs perfectly with our existing Alpenglow guide — cross-promotion opportunity
AI agents trend (Bybit launch, TRON foundation, Binance WotD theme) — potential content gap to fill next week
